title: lantana sandersii
intro: Lantana sandersii, also known as yellow fever tea, is a plant species native to Central America and Mexico, belonging to the Lantana genus. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with yellow fever. It is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help protect against various diseases. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat fever, headache, and other ailments.
